  An async function is not assignable to a non-async function type.
tluaAsyncContract.tlua(47,32): error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'async (url: string) => (boolean, any)' is not assignable to parameter of type 'function'.
  An async function is not assignable to a non-async function type.
tluaAsyncContract.tlua(60,3): error TLUA100023: An async function can only be called from an async context.
tluaAsyncContract.tlua(71,3): error TLUA100023: An async function can only be called from an async context.


==== tluaAsyncContract.tlua (12 errors) ====
    // The tlua coroutine contract: an async function may only be called from an
    // async context. Async functions return their plain type (or pack), never
    // Promise<T>.
    
    declare function request(url: string): (boolean, any);
    declare namespace coroutine {
    ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'declare'.
            ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'namespace'.
                      ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2819: Namespace name cannot be 'coroutine'.
      function create(f: (...: any) => any): any;
               ~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2391: Function implementation is missing or not immediately following the declaration.
      function wrap(f: (...: any) => any): (...: any) => any;
               ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2391: Function implementation is missing or not immediately following the declaration.
    }
    
    async function fetchOk(url: string): (boolean, any)
      local ok, res = request(url);
      return ok, res;
    end
    
    // OK: direct call from an async context; the result is the plain pack.
    async function handler(): number
      local ok, res = fetchOk("https://example.com");
      if ok then
        return 1;
      end
      return 0;
    end
    
    // Error: direct call from a sync function.
    function syncCaller(): void {
      fetchOk("nope");
      ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100023: An async function can only be called from an async context.
!!! related TLUA1356 tluaAsyncContract.tlua:26:10: Did you mean to mark this function as 'async'?
    }
    
    // Error: call at top level.
    fetchOk("top");
    ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100023: An async function can only be called from an async context.
    
    // Error: inferred alias keeps the contract (the flag rides the signature).
    function aliasCaller(): void {
      local f = fetchOk;
      f("aliased");
      ~
!!! error TLUA100023: An async function can only be called from an async context.
!!! related TLUA1356 tluaAsyncContract.tlua:34:10: Did you mean to mark this function as 'async'?
    }
    
    // OK: alias called from an async context.
    async function aliasAsyncCaller(): void
      local f = fetchOk;
      f("aliased");
    end
    
    // OK: passing an async function as a value is not a call.
    coroutine.create(fetchOk);
                     ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'async (url: string) => (boolean, any)' is not assignable to parameter of type 'function'.
!!! error TLUA2345:   An async function is not assignable to a non-async function type.
    local wrapped = coroutine.wrap(fetchOk);
                                   ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2345: Argument of type 'async (url: string) => (boolean, any)' is not assignable to parameter of type 'function'.
!!! error TLUA2345:   An async function is not assignable to a non-async function type.
    
    // OK: async recursion.
    async function pingpong(n: number): number
      if n <= 0 then
        return 0;
      end
      return pingpong(n - 1);
    end
    
    // Async arrow expressions participate too.
    local asyncArrow = async (): number => 42;
    function arrowSyncCaller(): void {
      asyncArrow(); // error
      ~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100023: An async function can only be called from an async context.
!!! related TLUA1356 tluaAsyncContract.tlua:59:10: Did you mean to mark this function as 'async'?
    }
    async function arrowAsyncCaller(): number
      return asyncArrow(); // OK
    end
    
    // Generic async functions keep the flag through instantiation.
    async function identityAsync<T>(x: T): T
      return x;
    end
    function genericSyncCaller(): void {
      identityAsync(1); // error
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA100023: An async function can only be called from an async context.
!!! related TLUA1356 tluaAsyncContract.tlua:70:10: Did you mean to mark this function as 'async'?
    }
    async function genericAsyncCaller(): number
      return identityAsync(2); // OK
    end
    
    // The async return type is the plain type, not Promise<T>.
    async function plain(): number
      return 3;
    end
    async function usePlain(): number
      local n = plain();
      return n + 1;
    end
